Retractor Lite 33 Hardware Features & Display Applications

Professional retractable banner stand hardware designed for trade shows, retail displays, and business presentations. The Retractor Lite 33 provides a stable, portable solution for displaying custom banners in high-traffic environments.

Key Hardware Features

  • Lightweight aluminum base construction for durability and portability
  • Available in professional black or silver finish options
  • Two swivel feet provide enhanced stability on various surfaces
  • Shock cord pole system for quick setup and breakdown
  • Snap rail attachment system for secure banner mounting
  • Banner tape bottom attachment for professional display tension

Product Specifications

Display Dimensions: 34.5" W x 84" H x 15" D
Hardware Weight: 6.25 lbs
Base Material: Lightweight aluminum construction
Setup Style: Retractable with shock cord pole system

Note: Banner graphics sold separately. Hardware includes snap rail and banner tape attachment system for custom banner installation.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Aluminum Construction for Retractable Banner Stand Durability

The Retractor Lite 33 hardware features professional-grade aluminum construction designed for repeated trade show use and long-term display applications.

Base Construction

Lightweight aluminum base provides the optimal balance of portability and stability. The durable aluminum construction resists dents and maintains professional appearance through multiple setup cycles.

Finish Options

Black Finish: Professional black coating ideal for corporate displays and formal trade show environments.

Silver Finish: Classic aluminum finish that complements various banner designs and display settings.

Pole System

Shock cord pole construction allows for quick assembly while maintaining structural integrity during display. The pole system retracts completely into the base for compact storage and transportation.

Stability Features

Two adjustable swivel feet provide enhanced stability on uneven surfaces commonly found in trade show venues, retail environments, and outdoor display locations.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Assembly & Setup for Retractor Lite 33 Hardware

The Retractor Lite 33 hardware system includes professional attachment components for secure banner mounting and quick display setup.

Banner Attachment System

Top Mounting: Snap rail system provides secure attachment for the top edge of custom banners. The snap rail ensures consistent banner tension and professional display appearance.

Bottom Mounting: Banner tape attachment system secures the bottom edge while allowing for easy banner changes and updates.

Setup Process

  1. Remove hardware from carrying case
  2. Extend shock cord pole to full height
  3. Attach banner to snap rail at top
  4. Secure bottom edge with banner tape system
  5. Adjust swivel feet for optimal stability

Storage & Transportation

Hardware components collapse into compact configuration for easy storage. The lightweight aluminum construction (6.25 lbs total) allows for single-person setup and transportation to trade show venues.

Compatibility

Designed specifically for use with Retractor Lite 33 banner graphics. Custom banner dimensions should match the 34.5" width specification for proper attachment and display tension.

Shipping Options for Retractor Display Hardware

Reliable shipping methods designed to deliver hardware safely to trade show venues, business locations, and display sites.

Standard Shipping

Ground shipping provides cost-effective delivery for advance trade show planning. Hardware packaging protects aluminum components during transit.

Expedited Shipping

Express and overnight shipping options available for urgent trade show deadlines. Expedited services ensure hardware arrives in time for booth setup and event preparation.

Trade Show Direct Shipping

Direct-to-venue shipping available for convention centers and trade show facilities. Coordinate delivery timing with booth setup schedules and venue receiving requirements.

Packaging Protection

Hardware components ship in protective packaging designed to prevent damage during transportation. Aluminum base and pole components receive individual protection within shipping containers.

Tracking & Delivery Confirmation

All hardware shipments include tracking information and delivery confirmation. Monitor shipment progress through online tracking systems and receive delivery notifications.

Trade Show & Business Uses for Retractor Lite 33 Hardware

Versatile display hardware suitable for professional environments requiring portable, high-impact banner presentation.

Hardware Compatibility & Banner Attachment Requirements

Technical specifications and requirements for custom banner graphics designed for use with Retractor Lite 33 hardware.

Banner Dimension Requirements

Width: 34.5" (banner must match hardware width for proper tension)
Height: Up to 84" maximum display height
Finished Size: Banner dimensions must account for snap rail and banner tape attachment areas

Attachment Specifications

Top Edge: Banner must include snap rail compatible edge for secure top attachment. Snap rail system requires specific banner finishing for proper hardware connection.

Bottom Edge: Banner tape attachment area must be included in banner design. Bottom attachment system provides display tension and stability.

Material Compatibility

Hardware system accommodates various banner materials including vinyl, fabric, and mesh options. Banner material weight should be appropriate for retractable display system.

Design Considerations

Banner graphics should account for slight curve that occurs with retractable display systems. Important text and graphics should be positioned for optimal viewing when banner is fully extended.

Hardware Note: This product includes hardware components only. Custom banner graphics must be ordered separately with appropriate attachment specifications for Retractor Lite 33 compatibility.

Frequently Asked Questions About Retractor Banner Hardware

What banner sizes work with the Retractor Lite 33 hardware?

The hardware displays banners up to 34.5" wide and 84" tall. Custom banners must be designed with proper snap rail and banner tape attachment specifications for secure mounting.

Does the hardware include banner graphics?

No, this product includes hardware components only. Custom banner graphics must be ordered separately with Retractor Lite 33 compatibility specifications.

How much does the complete hardware weigh?

The entire hardware system weighs 6.25 lbs, making it easy to transport to trade shows and display venues. The lightweight aluminum construction maintains durability while reducing shipping costs.

Can I choose between black and silver finishes?

Yes, the Retractor Lite 33 hardware is available in both professional black and silver finish options to complement your display environment and branding requirements.

How quickly can hardware orders be processed?

Hardware orders can be processed in 1-5 business days depending on your selected production timeframe. Priority 1-day processing is available for urgent trade show deadlines.

Will the hardware work on uneven surfaces?

Yes, the two swivel feet adjust to provide stability on uneven surfaces commonly found in trade show venues and outdoor display locations.

Can I ship hardware directly to my trade show venue?

Yes, direct-to-venue shipping is available for convention centers and trade show facilities. Coordinate delivery timing with your booth setup schedule and venue receiving requirements.

What materials can be displayed with this hardware?

The hardware system accommodates vinyl, fabric, and mesh banner materials. Banner weight should be appropriate for retractable display systems, and proper attachment specifications are required.
